name: The Archipelago: Re-Sized
description:
[NULL] Explore the Archipelago, a collection of islands that are the only land left after the Flood. 5 different factions, each with their own story and motivations to play as and explore. There are much more dangerous creatures that rest beneath the waves, 8 foot tall sea anthros, known as the Tivála, who rule and control the waves, known for their mysterious ways

Despite this threat, life in the Archipelago for each of the factions goes on. Play as one of the 5 factions present in the simulator:

Play as a commoner, without binds nor obligations, sail the seas at your own pace and explore freely.

Become an officer of the Stalwarts, a military force that tries to put order to the chaos of the Archipelago and take down hostile Tivála with impressive dreadnaughts

Play as a rambunctious pirate of the Shavui, A 'civilized' pirate faction with a allegiance with the Hoarder.

Become a cultist of the Apex with the Faerr, a mysterious cult that worships the Tivála and the Apex.

Explore the world pre-flood with the Divers, A nomadic and secretive group of Casters that dive down to the Veil to bring back records and artifacts of the world we once knew.

Alongside the Tivála came a new revelation, one of the workings of the world itself: roí. The ability to warp water itself to your whim. Such a talent is held close, and only the Divers and a few others with the ability to harness roí, known as Casters, know how to harness this talent...

This is the Re-Sized version, essentially making the Tivála somewhat regular size instead of titans. Some clarifications and touch-ups have been made, making the bot a lot more consistent and put together, but a lot of extra content has been left out. This is because, while the bot has a lot of potential and I would love to expand it more, it has remained one of my most unpopular. Because of this, I do not wish to put in the effort for something that will get no attention. If these versions do get a lot of interest, however, I will make a director's cut including lots more descriptions and people of interest.

I hope you enjoy.
creator: NullSeu
